name: D-COND Lab — Charmed, Exhaustion & Concentration
description: Bench for the final condition fixes. CHARMED (D-COND-1): drive the Charmed Knight — he is charmed by the Dryad, so try to attack or target her with a harmful effect and the game refuses (the click does nothing); the Ogre is a perfectly legal target, and you can still buff/heal the Dryad if you like. The enemy AI obeys the same rule in reverse — a charmed creature never picks its charmer. EXHAUSTION (D-COND-2): march Thorin up to the Ogre and hit it with [Poisoned Fang] over and over — each hit stacks a level of exhaustion. Watch the Ogre's turn budget halve at level 2, its attack/save rolls go to disadvantage at level 3, its hit-point maximum halve at level 4, its speed hit 0 at level 5, and it collapse at level 6. CONCENTRATION (D-COND-3): have Brother Aldric cast Spirit Guardians (concentration), then let the Ogre focus him down — the instant he drops to 0 the aura winks out, because an incapacitated creature can't concentrate (a stun or paralysis would do the same; those are covered by tests since no SRD monster here applies them).
